name: m100-bootstrap
description: M100 Bootstrap Installer - Platform-aware installation of M100 development tools

scripts.presetup: test -n "$npm_lifecycle_event" && test "$npm_lifecycle_event" = setup || (echo 'Error: Run via npm run setup' && exit 1); bash ./scripts/m100-presetup.sh
scripts.postsetup: test -n "$npm_lifecycle_event" && test "$npm_lifecycle_event" = setup || (echo 'Error: Run via npm run setup' && exit 1); bash ./scripts/m100-postsetup.sh

author: M100 Platform Team
